hero.subtitle: Track focused work sessions, billable hours, and study time — with a privacy-first timer that lives right in your browser. No account needed.
hero.reassurance: Start in under 10 seconds. No login required.

cards.title: Companies & Teams
cards.description: Track employee focus time, billable hours, and project work — without complex setups or IT overhead. Get clear reports your whole team can actually use.

cards.title: Employees
cards.description: Understand where your work hours actually go. Sharpen your focus, cut wasted time, and share accurate reports whenever your manager asks.

cards.title: Students
cards.description: Plan study sessions, avoid burnout, and see how much you really study each day. Build better habits with data you can trust.

cards.title: Freelancers
cards.description: Never lose a billable minute again. Track time across projects and tags, and generate clean overviews of your hours and earnings — ready for clients.

features.title: Built for real work, not demos
features.positioning: Designed for modern work — from solo freelancers and students to small teams and growing companies.
features.subtitle: Every feature exists because someone needed it. Nothing is here just to fill a pricing table.

items.title: Three Modes, One Extension
items.body: Stopwatch, manual entry, or disciplined Pomodoro focus sessions — switch any time. Your project and description carry over automatically so you never lose context.

items.title: Your Data, Your Browser
items.body: Everything is stored directly in your browser via chrome.storage.local. No server ever sees your data unless you choose cloud sync. Works fully offline — on a plane, in a cabin, wherever you work.

items.title: Know Your Patterns
items.body: Weekly and monthly analytics: time by project, daily session charts, and export-ready breakdowns for invoicing. Spot where your hours go and reclaim your focus.

howItWorks.title: Up and running in under a minute

steps.title: Install in seconds
steps.desc: Click "Add to Chrome". No permissions beyond storage and alarms. The extension icon appears instantly in your toolbar.

steps.title: Create a project
steps.desc: Name it, pick a colour, set an optional hour target. Takes 10 seconds. Up to 5 projects on the free plan.

steps.title: Start tracking
steps.desc: Hit the play button. Pause for breaks. Stop when done. Your history builds automatically — nothing to remember.

featureGrid.title: Everything you need, nothing you don't
featureGrid.subtitle: Powerful enough for professionals, simple enough for anyone.

items.title: Stopwatch, Manual & Pomodoro
items.desc: Three timer modes. Switch anytime, description carries over.

items.title: Project Tracking
items.desc: Colour-coded projects with optional hour targets.

items.title: Weekly & Monthly Stats
items.desc: Clear charts showing exactly where your time goes.

items.title: Privacy First
items.desc: Data lives in your browser. No tracking, no ads.

items.title: Cloud Sync (Premium)
items.desc: Sync across all your devices in real time.

items.title: Export (Premium)
items.desc: Export to CSV or Excel for invoicing or reporting.

items.name: Sarah K.
items.quote: I've tried every time tracker out there. Work Timer is the first one I actually keep using. It's in my browser, doesn't nag me, and just works.

items.name: Marcus T.
items.quote: The Pomodoro integration alone is worth it. I pair it with my project board and know exactly how long each feature took. Billing clients is a breeze.

items.name: Priya R.
items.quote: We needed something the whole team could use without an IT budget. The free tier covers 80% of what we need, and the yearly plan is a no-brainer.

pricing.title: Simple, transparent pricing
pricing.subtitle: Free forever for essential use. Upgrade when you need more.

freePlan.name: Free Plan
freePlan.description: 5 projects · 14-day history · All timer modes · Local storage only
freePlan.noAccountLine: Use the Chrome extension with no account — just install and start.

items.q: Do I need an account to use it?
items.a: Not at all. Install the Chrome extension and start tracking immediately — no sign-up, no email, no credit card. An account is only needed if you want cloud sync, multi-device access, or the web dashboard.
All your time data lives locally in your browser. Nothing is sent to any server unless you explicitly enable cloud sync on a Premium plan. Your data is never sold or shared with third parties.

items.q: What's the difference between Free and Premium?
items.a: Free gives you up to 5 projects, 14 days of history, and all three timer modes — more than enough to get started. Premium unlocks unlimited projects, full history, CSV & Excel export, cloud sync across devices, and detailed analytics.

items.q: Can I export my time entries?
items.a: Yes. Premium users can export entries to CSV or Excel, filtered by project and date range. Reports are formatted and ready for client invoicing, team reviews, or personal records.

Completely. The extension runs entirely in your browser with no internet required — on a plane, in a cabin, wherever you work. If cloud sync is enabled, it catches up automatically when you're back online.
Work Timer is focused on desktop browsers — where most deep work happens. Premium users also get access to the web dashboard at w-timer.com for viewing analytics and managing entries from any device.

cta.disclaimer: No credit card required · Works offline · Free forever for core features
